name: io.github.AKzar1el/mcp-gsc
title: Google Search Console
description: Read-only MCP server for Google Search Console: search analytics, URL inspection, sites, sitemaps.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: List every tool this server exposes and report whether your Google connection is currently authenticated.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List the Search Console properties the connected Google account can access.

tools.name: query_search_analytics
tools.description: Impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position over a date range.

tools.name: inspect_url
tools.description: Google's URL Inspection report for a single page: index status, last crawl, mobile usability.

tools.name: list_sitemaps
tools.description: All sitemaps submitted for a property, with status and warning/error counts.

mcp_gsc_worker_domain.description: Hostname of your self-deployed Cloudflare Worker, as printed by `wrangler deploy` (see SETUP.md)
